chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-4046 of 2019 CP No.D-4109 of 2019 __________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) __________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.17832/2019 2. For hearing of main case. 11.10.2021 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Advocate for Respondent Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. ------------ These two pending petitions apparently are covered by the case of M/s. Sky Overseas vs. Federation of Pakistan reported as 2019 PTD 1964. All learned counsel in attendance seeks disposal of these two petitions on the same reasoning, rationale and the conclusion drawn by the Divisional Bench in the aforesaid case. The judgment shall apply mutatis mutandis accordingly and these two petitions are disposed of. Office to place copy of this order in connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
